set_name: BanG Dream! FILM LIVE 2nd Stage Extra Booster
preorder_price_source: Goldstar Collectibles — confirmed via similar EN extra booster pricing ($38.88/box)

pull_rates.note: BanG Dream Rare — signature foil rarity

competitive_notes: Extra boosters are primarily collector items. Limited card pool means fewer competitive-viable cards.
notes: Release date and preorder price are estimates. Extra boosters have different box structures than standard — 4 cards per pack rather than 8. BanG Dream uses unique rarity designations (BDR, SPM) not standard WS rarities.
